sectiondef.header: Timeout in terms of number of times status register polled to check eFuse Crc check id done.

briefdescription.para: Poll timeout during CRC verification.
eFuse read mode
eFuse program mode
eFuse read mode
eFuse program mode
eFuse operation mode
eFuse normal read
eFuse margin read
eFuse normal read
eFuse margin read
eFuse read mode
This function calculates CRC of AES key.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the little-endian formatted key for which CRC has to be calculated.
- Pointer to the key for which CRC has to be calculated.

listitem.para: Process each bit of 32-bit Value
Get 5-bit from Address
Return CRC value upon success
Process each bits of 32-bit Value.
Get 5-bit from Address.
Return CRC value upon success.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 CrcRegOffSet, u32 CrcDoneMask, u32 CrcPassMask, u32 Crc)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseCheckAesKeyCrc

briefdescription.para: This function performs the CRC check of AES key/User0 key/User1 key.

parameterdescription.para: - Register offset of respective CRC register
- Respective CRC done mask in status register
- Respective CRC pass mask in status register
- A 32 bit CRC value of an expected AES key.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful CRC check.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION - If AES boot key integrity check is failed.
XST_FAILURE - If AES boot key integrity check has not finished.

simplesect.para:
Expected CRC calculation steps:
Convert the key provided at XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY into hexadecimal little-endian format.
Calculate the CRC on this little-endian formatted AES key using XNvm_AesCrcCalc() function.
Provide the calculated CRC as the value of expected CRC.

parameterdescription.para: - Register offset of respective CRC register
- Respective CRC done mask in status register
- Respective CRC pass mask in status register
- A 32 bit CRC value of an expected AES key.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful CRC check.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION If AES boot key integrity check is failed.
XST_FAILURE If AES boot key integrity check has not finished.

simplesect.para: For Calculating the CRC of the AES key use the XNvm_AesCrcCalc() function.

listitem.para: Read the WR_LOCK_REG. Unlock the controller if read as locked
Write the crc to crcregoffset of eFuse_ctrl register
Wait for crcdone
Read efuse status register. If Crc is not done return XST_FAILURE
Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION if Crc is not Pass. Return XST_SUCCESS upon crc pass and done
Lock efuse controller
Read the WR_LOCK_REG. Unlock the controller if read status is locked.
Write the 32 bit crc to crc reg offset of eFuse_ctrl register.
Wait for crc_done.
Read efuse status register. If Crc is not done return XST_FAILURE.

inbodydescription.para: Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION if Crc is not Pass. Return XST_SUCCESS upon crc done and pass.

listitem.para: Lock efuse controller.

briefdescription.para: This function zeroizes the memory and verifies that the memory has been correctly zeroized.

detaileddescription.para:
DataPtr
Pointer to the memory which need to be zeroized.
Length
Length of the data in bytes.
XST_SUCCESS: If Zeroization is successful.
XST_FAILURE: If Zeroization is not successful.
This function zeroizes the memory and verifies that the memory has been correctly zeroized.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the memory which need to be zeroized.
Length of the data in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If Zeroization is successful.
XST_FAILURE If Zeroization is not successful.
Clear the buffer provided.
Read it back to verify. Return success upon successful zeroization else return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the buffer provided.
Read it back to verify. Return success upon successful zeroization else return XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: - eFuse controller base address.
- Register offset from the base address.
is the eFuse controller base address.
is the register offset from the base address.

briefdescription.para: This function writes the value into the given register.

parameterdescription.para: - eFuse controller base address.
- Register offset from the base address.
- 32-bit value to be written to the register.
is the eFuse controller base address.
is the register offset from the base address.
is the 32-bit value to be written to the register.

briefdescription.para: This function locks the eFUSE Controller to prevent accidental writes to eFUSE controller registers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - eFUSE controller locked.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_LOCK - Failed to lock eFUSE controller register access.
XST_SUCCESS eFUSE controller locked.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_LOCK Failed to lock eFUSE controller register access.
Write lock Passcode in efuse control at offset of WR_LOCK_REG
Read the WR_LOCK_REG if above write was successful. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_LOCK if not success
Write lock Passcode in EFUSE_CTRL_WR_LOCK_REG.
Read back EFUSE_CTRL_WR_LOCK_REG to check if write was successful. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_LOCK if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function unlocks the eFUSE Controller for writing to its registers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - eFUSE controller unlocked.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK - Failed to unlock eFUSE controller register access.
XST_SUCCESS eFUSE controller locked.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK Failed to unlock eFUSE controller register access.
Write unlock Passcode in efuse control at offset of WR_LOCK_REG
Read the WR_LOCK_REG if above write was successful. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK if not success
Write unlock passcode in EFUSE_CTRL_WR_LOCK_REG
Read back EFUSE_CTRL_WR_LOCK_REG register to check if write was successful. Return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK if not success.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up eFUSE controller for given operation and read mode.

parameterdescription.para: - Operation to be performed read/program(write).
- Read mode for eFUSE read operation.
- Input Clock frequency for timers initialization.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - eFUSE controller setup for given op.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK - Failed to unlock eFUSE controller register access.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_PGM_TBIT_PATTERN - Error in T-Bit pattern.
XST_FAILURE - Error on set read mode failure.
Unlock eFuse controller by writing into WR_LOCK_REG
Set Read mode and return XST_FAILURE on failure
Initialize eFuse controller timers with validated frequency by writing into registers(tpgm, trd, tsu_h_ps, tsu_h_ps_cs, tsu_h_cs)
Enable programming of Xilinx reserved eFuse
Check for T bits enabled and return XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_PGM_TBIT_PATTERN on failure

briefdescription.para: This function disables Margin Read mode of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if resetting read mode is successful.
XST_FAILURE - if there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS If resetting read mode is successful.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Reset Read mode from margin read mode by writing the EFUSE_CFG_REG
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG register.
Reset read mode from margin read mode by writing the EFUSE_CFG_REG.

briefdescription.para: This function disables programming mode of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if eFUSE programming is disabled successfully.
XST_FAILURE - if there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS If eFUSE programming is disabled successfully.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Disable eFuse program mode by writing EFUSE_CFG_REG register and return XST_FAILURE on failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Disable eFuse program mode by writing EFUSE_CFG_REG register

briefdescription.para: Validate the input string contains valid AES key.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to AES key.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On valid input AES key string.
XST_INVALID_PARAM On invalid length of the input string.
XST_FAILURE On non hexadecimal character in string

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to AES key.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input AES key string.
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string.
XST_FAILURE - On non hexadecimal character in string

listitem.para: Validate the Key pointer, return XST_INVALID_PARAM if it is NULL.
Validate the key length, return XST_INVALID_PARAM if it is not supported.
